definition.name: near_fixed_algebra
definition.definition: A=Im P=Ker(1-P) subseteq B(H)_sa, the range of the spectral idempotent P of an almost-idempotent positive unital Phi; a real subspace containing 1, with the projected Jordan product a•b:=P(a∘b). The order, unit, and order-unit norm on A are inherited EXACTLY from B(H)_sa; only • is approximate. (def-near-fixed-algebra)
